RISK: Siphon Soul -1 Str/Dex permanent if fight drags. WIN%: 32%

WIN%: 30% (-2). Lagavulin cost 45 HP (its 20-dmg awake cycle outpaced my 8-10 block hands) — worse than the 25-35 expected. But: Meal Ticket relic (healing source #1) + Metallicize (block scaling). Now 37/80 with Rest F8 next, then Treasure F9, Elite F10. MARGIN NOTE: Lagavulin at A9 showed no stun turn on damage-wake — it went straight to ATTACK(20) intent next turn. Either the stun was consumed invisibly during its turn or A9 changes wake behavior; worth verifying, it changes burst-wake math.

WIN%: 36% (-2 for no Weak source). HEXAGHOST PLAN: T1 free (Activate) — Inflame + Metallicize setup. T2 Divider 42 (7x6) — block max, accept ~25. Then 7-move cycle: Sear(6+Burn), Tackle(10), Sear, Inflame(+12blk/+2Str), Tackle, Sear, INFERNO 24/36. Burning Pact exhausts Burns; over-block by 2 per Burn in hand. Kill speed is the real win con: Inflame+Reaper+Pommel, ~20/turn vs 250 HP = ~13 turns. Tight.

WIN%: 45% (+9). ACT 1 CLEAR — Hexaghost beaten at 48/80, killed in 13 turns. Thorns (Bronze Scales) was the fight MVP: ~60 counter damage off multi-hits. Deck: Inflame+Reaper+2xIW+Pommel core, FNP+Burning Pact exhaust seed, Metallicize. Relics: Black Blood, Meal Ticket, Mummified Hand. MARGIN NOTE: Bronze Scales vs Hexaghost was huge — Thorns 3 x 6-hit Divider/Inferno = 18/turn free. 'Thorns scales with enemy hit count' deserves a heuristic line for multi-hit bosses.

MARGIN NOTE: Snecko Confusion at A9 is brutal for skill-light hands — a 'pre-Snecko' heuristic should say: hold a 0-cost-heavy hand plan and expect 2 turns of unblockable 27s. Snecko expected cost should be priced 25-40, not 15-25.
